name: Phipps Famous Shortbread
recipeInstructions:
1. Spread the all-purpose flour on a baking sheet and place under a pre-heated broiler about 4-5 inches from the element.
2. Roast the flour, watching it carefully until it is medium brown on both sides. This should take about three minutes total.
3. Allow the flour to cool completely.
4. In a large bowl, mix the softened butter with the fruit sugar and sifted rice flour until well combined.
5. Fold in the roasted flour into the mixture, ensuring it is evenly distributed.
6. Chop the Belgian chocolate into small pieces, approximately the size of a sugar cube.
7. Mix the chopped chocolate into the dough, taking care not to overwork it so as not to soften the chocolate too much.
8. Shape the dough as desired.
9. Bake at 300°F (150°C) for 1 hour.
10. Allow to cool completely before storing in an airtight container.
Yield depends upon size and shape.
